subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Divine Throne and been illumined by the light of His Countenance. God willing, thou shalt in all circumstances remain engaged in the remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی العرش حاضر و بانوار وجه فائز انشاء الله در جمیع احوال بذکرالله
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @attaining good pleasure of God, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
